channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Loose / raised kerb stone - tripping hazard, 9th June
item.description:
The pavement kerb outside 'The Bakery' house on Upper Bath Street is raised and presents a very dangerous tripping hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Bath Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Degraded road repair with holes, 9th June
item.description:
This damage has been deemed as repaired but having ridden past it today it remains dangerous to cyclists. To reiterate it is still falling apart and is under a bridge and thus cannot be seen before hitting it. I do not understand why this is considered safe. This has been a problem for an extended petiod of time and has not been resolved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 9th June
item.description:
Cut back bush from footway 2mtrs Completed at time of inspection Give and take TM Outside St George's Centre (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 deep potholes, 9th June
item.description:
Just beyond the railway bridge heading towards Woodmancote.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 9th June
item.description:
Damaged Tree FW in hours 2hr Emergency Give and take TM MAKE SAFE WITH FW CLOSURE, TREE BRANCHES FALLING ONTO FW. Will raise enquiry for tree Inspector ARBS TEAM TO ATTEND (Damaged Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 9th June
item.description:
Damaged tree branches from large dead branch. Making safe with FW Closure. Please pass on to relevant AHR to contact ARBS team to get tree cut.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface problem, 9th June
item.description:
Customer is reporting that the kerbs are uneven outside of the church. Several people have fallen and are a trip hazard.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface
